title: Winter Clothing - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Winter Clothing 5 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LOVE INC NEWBERG GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects people with local churches and service agencies. Basic goods and services are offered to clients as they are donated. Services available may include, but are not limited to: bicycles, breakfast/lunch bags, clothing closets (adults and children), community meals, counseling services, diapers, haircuts, H.U.G.S. (hats, umbrellas, gloves, scarves, and socks), kitchen supplies, laundry service, bedding/linens, personal grooming supplies/toiletries, over-the-counter medications, personal care kits, physical therapy, showers, water bill assistance, and firewood. Accepts donations of bedding and linen, clothing, and personal grooming supplies. 200 S College Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 537-3999 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MID-COLUMBIA COMMUNITY ACTION COUNCIL THE GLORIA CENTER MONTHLY DROP IN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides access to showers and laundry facilities, hygiene items, a hot meal, warming and cooling supplies (blankets, tarps, hats, gloves, socks, hand and toe warmers, hydration packets, cooling towels, sunscreen, and lip balm), and connections to community resources. 2505 W 7th Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: January-October Last Friday of the month 9am-3pm, hot meal noon-3pm November-December 3rd Friday of the month 9am-3pm, hot meal noon-3pm Email (541) 298-5131 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SOCIETY OF ST VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIAL SERVICES OF BEND CLOTHING ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a seasonal clothing rack with slightly used coats and clothing. Offers $25 clothing vouchers to the local store, SuperThrift (one time per family per year). Also offers socks, underwear, blankets, and pillows when available. 950 SE 3rd Street Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Clothing: Men, women, and children in need of clothing to protect against the cold Clothing Vouchers: Age 18 and older; one per year, per family Hours: Monday 2pm-6pm, Tuesday-Thursday 10am-2pm Email (541) 389-6643 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SPECIAL EVENTS LINN COUNTY LOVE INC OF LINN COUNTY MONTHLY CLOTHING GIVEAWAY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a monthly clothing giveaway and yearly winter coat giveaway. 1910 Grand Prairie Road SE Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 3rd Saturday of the month January-June, August, and November 10am-2pm 3rd Saturday of the month July 10am-2pm: Celebrate Recovery's Recovery in the Park at Bryant Park, Albany, OR, 97321 August: Back to School Giveaways in Albany, Lebanon, and Sweet Home. Event and location times vary. Winter Coat Giveaway: 3rd Saturday of the month October 10am-2pm at Verbatim Church, 800 34th Avenue SE, Albany, OR 97322 Get Directions More Details THE SALVATION ARMY THE DALLES CORPS FAMILY SERVICES AND FOOD PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shopping style food pantry. Also provides emergency blankets, winter coats, personal grooming supplies and toiletries when available. Services are offered on a first-come, first-serve basis. 811 E 2nd Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 1pm-3pm Email (541) 296-6417 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC NEWBERG GAP MINISTRIES MID-COLUMBIA COMMUNITY ACTION COUNCIL MONTHLY DROP IN CENTER SOCIETY OF ST VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIAL SERVICES OF BEND CLOTHING ASSISTANCE SPECIAL EVENTS LINN COUNTY MONTHLY CLOTHING GIVEAWAY THE SALVATION ARMY THE DALLES CORPS FAMILY SERVICES AND FOOD PANTRY
